title: crepidium elmeri
intro: Crepidium elmeri, also known as the Elmer's Pouch Orchid, is a type of orchid species belonging to the family Orchidaceae. The plant is native to the Philippines and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and sore throat. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, acting as an antimicrobial agent, and serving as a natural remedy for digestive issues. In traditional herbal preparations, Crepidium elmeri is often dried and made into a tea or infusion, which is then used to treat various health conditions.
